Medical Excellence

Our Specialist
Departments

We offer a full spectrum of medical services powered by advanced technology and led by some of the world's most distinguished medical professionals.

Cardiology

World-class heart care with advanced diagnostic and surgical capabilities for cardiac health.

Appointment

Emergency Medicine

24/7 rapid response for life-threatening conditions with a highly skilled trauma team.

Appointment

Neurology

Expert care for complex neurological conditions using the latest in neuroimaging and treatment.

Appointment

Orthopedics

Advanced treatments for bone, joint, and muscle health, from sports injuries to joint replacement.

Appointment

Pediatrics

Compassionate healthcare for infants, children, and adolescents in a kid-friendly environment.

Appointment

Radiology

Cutting-edge imaging technology for precise diagnosis and minimally invasive procedures.

Appointment
International Support Online

AHAD International Hospital delivers trusted tertiary care, multidisciplinary expertise, and patient-centered outcomes for local and international families.
